author: @YearRoundHibernater
text: You might want to look into creating a discord server, for everyone to drop ideas and discuss things, it'd be a far more streamline way then juggling e-mails it's literally designed for it and integrates with twitch too if you want to have anyone from discord jump on a voice call they can in seconds rather then you having to go through a bunch of different windows and editing

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: we know twitch mate and there is just so much time that can be spent on doing this sort of stuff - not having a learning curve is really good.

replies.author: @YoureNowOnTV
replies.text: Discord would definitely be the way to go. It’s effectively Twitch chat as a stand-alone program with the ability to post vids and pics in different areas/rooms/folders.

author: @morski_kapetan
text: This probably means that there would be less content on YT? I hope this YT channel will be around for a while because I go back to older videos quite often.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: nope - content will stay the same

author: @matthewellisor5835
text:
Don't know how brave I might be in front of a camera for a few hundred-thousand of my closest friends to see.

I pledge that even with this apprehension, I'll choose to give it a go when I'm next building something for the homestead. 
(It could be one of a new (to me, I just bought the used panels) solar array, a sand point shallow well, an improved watering system for the chickens, motorization for the three-foot tall child's scooter or whatever else might be fancied that day.)

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: that is awesome mate and tbh you don't really know until you try - cheers

author: @barbufodor1186

author: @stevetobias4890
text:
A mesh of minds in an open discussion would be great. I love the idea of a forum based community whether it be in a standard web based text content or a video / Skype based content. 
I often wonder if you would work as a Reddit channel as well where viewers could post questions and get ideas from you and others.

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I don't know. mate to be honest Luke has twitch experience so basically we don't have a learning curve here - so that's good!

author: @infinitelyuniversal2390
text:
You guys are wonderful as always* i just wish i had the time like some do to exercise  creativity.  Im a full time working single father, 😌  and i have soo.... many ideas in my mind its difficult to choose one from start to finish.. 
I would really enjoy being apart of your team 😉 watching you guys beautiful creations come to life is more then a joy to me 😊
Personally i like to create what has never been done before, such as my own engine design,artificial buoyancy generator, mechanical anti-gravity propulsion, make battery chemistry from scratch, and devolop a building material, to eventually build my own vehicle that float, drive on land, fly, and possible go to space. Has alway been dream of mine to build craft that is like nothing ever made before, so i can then travel wherever whenever i please 😊

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I love that dream mate - nice ambition

author: @binmanblog
